title: Registration of Foreign Principal to Philippine Agencies
content:
A foreign principal that acts as direct employer may be registered to more than one Philippine agency provided that: (1) a uniform compensation package is adopted by the principal and the agencies; (2) the principal has a verified job order of at least 50 workers; or (3) the principal must have hired at least 50 workers within a period of one year immediately preceding the registration.

A principal licensed to operate as a foreign placement agency by its government may be registered to a maximum of two (2) Philippine agencies provided that: (1) a uniform compensation package is adopted by the principal and the agencies; (2) the principal has a verified job order of at least 50 workers; or (3) the principal must have hired at least 50 workers within a period of one year immediately preceding the registration.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
